method: Document authored in REAL Word via osascript object model: make new document; content 'from word bold check'; set bold of font object of (words 3 thru 3 of text object of d) to true; save as ... file format format document into tests/fixtures/.oracle-word-authored.docx (not checked in); closed by post-save name; doc count 0 before and after. Word emitted three runs in document.xml: 'from word ' plain, 'bold ' with <w:b/> (Word folded the trailing space into the bold run), 'check' plain. Clone opened it headlessly: wordAPI.openBytes -> WC.PM.openDocx -> selectText per word -> WC.PM.getState().bold.
overall: PASS — a document authored by real Word imports into the PM core with run-level bold intact; getState() reports true only inside the bolded run.
pidSafety: make new document path: initialCount=0 recorded before, count returned to 0 after close-by-name; Word never quit.
